name: RangeSlider

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: The basic type accepted by the update

unions.name: RangeSlider
unions.comment: The base model for the slider

aliases.name: AxisTick
aliases.comment:
Represents a tick that goes along the X axis.
The value determines where it should go,
isLabeled determines if the it should have a label below.
The label is formatted by the formatter.

values.name: getSelectedValues
values.comment: Gets the last selected from and to values (from, to)

values.name: getValues
values.comment: Gets the current from and to values (from, to)

values.name: setAxisTicks
values.comment: Sets the ticks that will appear in the x-axis.

values.name: setDimensions
values.comment: Sets the width and height of the range slider when rendered

values.name: setExtents
values.comment: Sets the minimum and maximum values possible to select

values.name: setFormatter
values.comment: Formats the value displayed above the handles and for axis ticks

values.name: setStepSize
values.comment: Sets the step size which determines the interval for possible values

values.name: setValues
values.comment:
Sets the position of the 'from' handle and the 'to' handle.
Not intended to be used after the initial setup - it may not act as expected if the sliders are currently being moved.

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Returns the subscriptions necessary to run

values.name: update
values.comment: Takes a Msg and a RangeSlider and applies it to create an updated RangeSlider

name: CssHooks

unions.name: CssClasses
unions.comment: The classes that will be used on the range slider elements

unions.name: CssIds
unions.comment: The id for the range slider container
